title: 走完案例，再看对象和关系
prompt:
Create a polished 16:9 Chinese slide for leadership. Title: 走完案例，再看对象和关系. Subtitle: 把前一页穿过的真实例子，收敛成清晰的对象与关系总表. Style must match the approved deck style: clean light background, strong Chinese readability, management-report tone.

This slide must be based on:
- 三层图谱对象与关系设计.md
- 计费案例核心概念标准定义.md
- business-graph/计费场景/01计费场景业务图谱.md
Do not invent definitions or examples beyond those files.

This is a brand-new page replacing the old object-classification slide. It should not just classify objects. It should summarize what needs to be remembered after seeing the example on the previous slide: 图里有哪些关键对象、它们之间主要是什么关系、最容易混的边界是什么。

Layout:
Use a top object-and-relation summary section, a middle boundary-rules section, and a bottom confusion-check strip.

Top section title: 这张图里有哪些关键对象
Present 4 grouped columns with concise object cards and one example each:
1. 业务对象组
- BusinessDomain：业务感知
- NetworkScenario：计费场景
- ConfigurationSolution：差异化计费组合方案
2. 特性对象组
- Feature：GWFD-020301 内容计费基本功能；GWFD-020300 在线计费
- SubFeature：URL 内容识别计费；默认 any 兜底计费
- License：LKV3G5BCBC01 / LKV3G5PCCB01
3. 配置任务对象组
- ConfigTask：配置七层过滤条件；配置计费动作链；配置 Rule；配置 UserProfile 与 Rule 绑定
4. 命令对象组
- MMLCommand：ADD URR；ADD RULE；SET REFRESHSRV
- ConfigObject：URR；PCCPOLICYGRP；RULE；USERPROFILE
- CommandParameter：URRID；POLICYNAME

Middle section title: 这些对象之间主要靠什么关系连起来
Show only the most important relation chains:
- BusinessDomain contains NetworkScenario instantiated_as ConfigurationSolution
- ConfigurationSolution uses_feature Feature
- Feature has_subfeature SubFeature
- Feature decomposes_to ConfigTask
- ConfigTask invokes MMLCommand
- MMLCommand operates_on ConfigObject
- CommandParameter references ConfigObject
Also show two special orchestration relations:
- FeatureTaskOrderEdge：特性下配置任务顺序
- TaskCommandOrderEdge：配置任务内命令顺序

Right-side panel title: 三条边界判定规则
Show these exact logic points:
1. 有正式特性编号的，优先判定为特性，不是子特性
2. 能独立回答“现场到底在解决什么问题”的，优先判定为场景，不是特性
3. 已经下沉到“如何组织一段稳定配置动作链”的，优先判定为配置任务，不是特性

Bottom strip title: 最容易混淆的三组对象
Show 3 contrast cards:
1. 计费场景 vs 内容计费基本功能
计费场景是场景；内容计费基本功能是特性
2. GWFD-020302/020303/020306 vs URL 内容识别计费
前者有正式编号，所以是特性；后者无独立编号，所以更适合作为子特性
3. 配置计费动作链 vs ADD URR
前者是配置任务；后者才是命令

Add one concluding takeaway:
先用真实案例把路径走通，再回头看对象和关系，三层图谱的边界才真正清楚。

Mandatory design rules:
- This page is a summary page after the walkthrough, not an abstract dictionary
- Use real examples everywhere
- Avoid large text paragraphs; favor grouped cards and relation strips
- No placeholders, no watermark, no logos, no page number
